channel.title: GitHub Trending - Aggiornati di recente in All Languages (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Aggiornati di recente) più popolari in All Languages nel periodo weekly.

item.description:
👤 Owner: ohmyzsh

📝 Repository: ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh

📄 Descrizione: 🙃 A delightful community-driven (with 2,500+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.
